subject: Sports
title: Federer vs Nadal vs Djokovic
description: Learn Federer vs Nadal vs Djokovic in one minute.

hook.text: Three players shared 66 Grand Slam titles over 20 years. Tennis may never see anything like it again.

buildup.text: Federer brought elegance. Nadal brought ferocity. Djokovic brought relentless precision. Each countered the others.

discovery.text: Nadal dominated Federer on clay. Djokovic solved both on hard courts. Each had a surface and a nemesis.

twist.text: Their rivalry extended careers—each refused to retire while the others kept winning. Pride fueled longevity.

climax.text: Federer retired in 2022 with Nadal crying beside him. Even rivals can share genuine love.

punchline.text: Three men, 66 titles, one golden era. Tennis perfected rivalry.

quiz.question: How many combined Grand Slam titles did Federer, Nadal, and Djokovic win?
